VALUE_TOO_LONG: The value for '{target}' is too long for storage.
RELATION_CONSTRAINT: Cannot delete or change the {field} because other records depend on it.
UNIQUE_CONSTRAINT: The value for the field '{target}' is already in use.
FOREIGN_KEY_FAIL: Operation failed: The provided {field} does not exist in the system.
NOT_FOUND: The requested record was not found in our database.
